---
title: "Aphid abundance analysis"
---

## Introduction

This document analyses aphid abundance (aphids per frond) under different treatments.

### Load libraries

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(plotrix)
library(readr)
library(readxl)
library(lme4)
library(car)
```

### Data import

```{r data-import, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
df <- read.table("data_count_aphid.txt", sep = "\t", header = TRUE)
```

### Plot settings

```{r plot-settings, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
pos <- position_dodge(0.3)

base_theme <- theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    axis.text  = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.box = "vertical",
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    legend.text  = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.margin = margin(b = -10)
  )

cols <- scale_color_manual(
  name = "Treatment",
  values = c("control" = "#0072B2", "heated" = "#D55E00"),
  labels = c("Control", "Heated")
)
```

### Data processing

```{r data-processing, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
df_aph <- df %>%
  mutate(
    timepoint        = as.numeric(timepoint),
    duckweed_number  = as.numeric(duckweed_number),
    aphid_number     = as.numeric(aphid_number),
    aphids_per_frond = if_else(duckweed_number > 0,
                               aphid_number / duckweed_number,
                               NA_real_),
    treatment = factor(treatment, levels = c("control", "heated"))
  )

all_tp <- sort(unique(df_aph$timepoint))
```

### Aphid abundance analysis

```{r aphid-analysis, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=8, fig.height=6}
# Summarise mean ± SE
aph_sum_trt <- df_aph %>%
  filter(!is.na(timepoint)) %>%
  group_by(timepoint, treatment) %>%
  summarise(
    n      = sum(!is.na(aphids_per_frond)),
    aph_av = mean(aphids_per_frond, na.rm = TRUE),
    aph_se = plotrix::std.error(aphids_per_frond, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(time_f = factor(timepoint, levels = all_tp))

# Plot
px_aphids <- ggplot(aph_sum_trt, aes(
  x = time_f,
  y = aph_av,
  color = treatment,
  group = treatment
)) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = aph_av - aph_se, ymax = aph_av + aph_se),
    width = 0, linewidth = 0.8,
    position = pos,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ) +
  geom_point(size = 3, position = pos, na.rm = TRUE) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1, position = pos, na.rm = TRUE) +
  cols +
  scale_x_discrete(name = "Weeks", drop = FALSE) +
  labs(y = "Aphids per frond") +
  base_theme

px_aphids
```

### Statistical analysis

```{r aphid-statistics, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
df_aph_model <- df_aph %>%
  filter(!timepoint %in% c(0, 1),
         !is.na(aphids_per_frond))

model_aph <- lmer(aphids_per_frond ~ treatment * timepoint + (1|block) + (1|pond),data = df_aph_model)
Anova(model_aph, test = "F")
summary(model_aph)
```
